name: agent-protocol
description: Tool-agnostic engineering workflow plugin for Codex: surface-first change analysis, source-of-truth discipline, four-mode execution, and evidence-driven delivery.

interface.longDescription: Use Agent Protocol to guide Codex through source-of-truth discovery, surface-first impact analysis, Lean or Full delivery modes, Change Manifest handoffs, and verification-backed completion reports.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Protocol to plan this engineering change.
Run a surface-first investigation before coding.
Prepare a Change Manifest for this rollout.
